suite-0-0.title: SauceDemo Cart tests

tests.title: Saving the cart after logout
tests.fullTitle: SauceDemo Cart tests.Saving the cart after logout

params.script: (function(){const el=document.getElementById("add-to-cart-sauce-labs-backpack"); if(el) el.click();})()
(function(){const el=document.getElementById("add-to-cart-sauce-labs-backpack"); if(el) el.click();})()

tests.body: async()=>{await LoginPage.open();await LoginPage.login("standard_user","secret_sauce");await InventoryPage.addFirstProductToCart();await expect(InventoryPage.cartBadge).toBeExisting();await InventoryPage.openMenu();const logoutEl=await InventoryPage.logoutLink;await logoutEl.waitForExist({timeout:5e3});try{await logoutEl.waitForClickable({timeout:5e3});await logoutEl.click()}catch(err){const id=await logoutEl.getAttribute("id");if(id){const script=`(function(){const el=document.getElementById(${JSON.stringify(id)}); if(el) el.click();})()`;await browser.execute(script)}else{const script=`(function(){const el=document.querySelector('#logout_sidebar_link'); if(el) el.click();})()`;await browser.execute(script)}}await LoginPage.open();await LoginPage.login("standard_user","secret_sauce");try{await browser.waitUntil(async()=>(await browser.getUrl()).includes("/inventory.html"),{timeout:2e4,timeoutMsg:"expected to be on /inventory.html after login"});await(await InventoryPage.firstAddToCartButton).waitForExist({timeout:2e4})}catch(err){const url=await browser.getUrl();console.log("DEBUG: URL after login ->",url);try{const html=await(await $("html")).getHTML(false);const fs=require("fs");const dir="./debug";try{fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true})}catch(e){}const file=`${dir}/html-after-login-${Date.now()}.html`;fs.writeFileSync(file,html);console.log("DEBUG: saved HTML to",file)}catch(e){console.log("DEBUG: failed to save HTML ->",e&&e.message)}try{const perf=await browser.execute(()=>{try{return performance.getEntries()}catch(e){return null}});if(perf){const fs=require("fs");const dir="./debug";try{fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true})}catch(e){}const file=`${dir}/perf-after-login-${Date.now()}.json`;fs.writeFileSync(file,JSON.stringify(perf,null,2));console.log("DEBUG: saved performance entries to",file)}}catch(e){console.log("DEBUG: failed to save perf entries ->",e&&e.message)}throw err}const cartLink=await InventoryPage.shoppingCartLink;await cartLink.waitForExist({timeout:5e3});try{await cartLink.waitForClickable({timeout:5e3});await cartLink.click()}catch(err){const id=await cartLink.getAttribute("id");if(id){const script=`(function(){const el=document.getElementById(${JSON.stringify(id)}); if(el) el.click();})()`;await browser.execute(script)}else{const script=`(function(){const el=document.querySelector('.shopping_cart_link'); if(el) el.click();})()`;await browser.execute(script)}}const items=await $$(".cart_item");await expect(items.length).toBeGreaterThan(0)}
